content:
17/11 update (happy anniversary!)
Official timeline means major updates. Most of the new stuff this time is importing the stuff from there to here so I'll just list some major changes and points:
- Ward Phillips is no longer immortal
- Ramona's birth year has been shifted 3 years later
- Herbert's murder has been shifted back 1 year (The Sculptors' Association founding has not changed)
- Akut has been changed to Yakutsk
- Doll is now the 7th timeline paradox.
